sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: RC Strasbourg has shown decent form in their last 5 matches, securing 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses, with a strong attacking output (8 goals scored). Le Havre, however, has struggled, managing only 1 win and 1 draw against 3 losses, conceding heavily (12 goals against). Strasbourg's home advantage further tilts the balance in their favor.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Performance
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head encounters, Strasbourg dominated with a 3-0 away win, while Le Havre managed a 3-1 home victory earlier. Strasbourg's recent superiority and key player performances (like Dilane Bakwa) suggest they hold the edge.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Strasbourg ranks 6th with 57 points, boasting a solid offensive record (54 goals scored) and decent defense (41 conceded). Le Havre, at 16th with 31 points, struggles defensively (69 goals conceded), indicating vulnerability. Strasbourg's higher possession and duel-winning stats reinforce their likely dominance.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Strasbourg's missing key forward Emanuel Emegha may slightly impact their attack, but their midfield depth compensates. Le Havre's consistent failure to keep clean sheets (5/5 recent matches) and tendency to concede first (4/5) highlight defensive frailties. Trends suggest a game with over 2.5 goals and potential for both teams to score.
